2026-02-27T02:00:54.1724056Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1724346Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1724507Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1724728Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1725076Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1725197Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1725343Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1725431Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1725627Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-02-27T02:00:54.1725703Z [36;1mfi[0m
